findings: README claims the monitor script provides live progress, stuck detection, and runtime stats; confirm stampede-monitor.sh actually implements these behaviors.
README states the orchestrator detects dead agents via PID checks and re-queues tasks automatically; verify this detection and re-queue logic exist.
README says the monitor pane tracks progress in real time during runs; ensure monitor output reflects real-time task/agent status.
README asserts metaswarm commanders write swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl as runtime proof; verify files are generated during metaswarm runs.
